verdict: Paid Instagram is bleeding cash on a paused campaign delivering purchases at 10x the industry cost.
diagnosis: Cost per purchase sits at $301 this period, roughly 10x the ecommerce Meta benchmark, while the lead campaign is paused.

signals.headline: Cost per purchase hit $301
signals.detail: Each sale this period cost roughly ten times the $30 ecommerce benchmark for Meta. Spend is not converting efficiently.

signals.headline: Only 2 checkouts from 23 cart adds
signals.detail: Fewer than 1 in 10 cart adds reached checkout this period. The checkout flow is the biggest leak right now.

signals.headline: Frequency reached 3.18 per user
signals.detail: The same 1,873 people saw ads three times each. Audience is too small and creative fatigue is likely setting in.

signals.headline: Campaign status shows PAUSED
signals.detail: The Premium Box Awareness campaign is currently paused. Spend continues elsewhere with no active lead engine running.

signals.headline: 607 pixel leads captured
signals.detail: Lead volume held up this period despite the paused state. The form funnel still works when traffic arrives.

benchmark.label: Benchmark
benchmark.subheader: Meat brands cost 10x the category norm
benchmark.body: Ecommerce cost per purchase on Meta averages around $30 this year. Food and beverage advertisers see the lowest cost per thousand impressions at roughly $8. Billy Doe's $301 cost per purchase is far above both.

seasonal.label: Seasonal
seasonal.subheader: Grill season demand rising into summer
seasonal.body: Late spring and early summer drive peak meat purchase intent as outdoor cooking season opens. Bundle offers tied to grilling occasions are a known lever to lift average order value above the $120 free shipping threshold typical for the category.

competitor.label: Category
competitor.body: Meat is the toughest DTC food category. Cart abandonment runs near 81%, well above the 61% food average, driven by shipping costs and food safety concerns. Brand search and content marketing carry most conversions.

recommendations.title: Fix the checkout before reactivating spend
recommendations.detail: Only 2 of 23 cart adds reached checkout. Consider testing guest checkout, clearer shipping costs, and a bundle that hits the free shipping threshold before unpausing ads.

recommendations.title: Refresh creative and broaden the audience
recommendations.detail: Frequency of 3.18 on a reach of 1,873 signals fatigue. Worth testing new Reels creative tied to grill season and expanding the audience to lower repeat exposure.

recommendations.title: Shift budget toward retention and brand search
recommendations.detail: DTC meat lives on repeat buyers and brand search. Consider redirecting some paid budget into email flows and SEO content while paid efficiency is being rebuilt.
